agentWorkflow.task: Create the branch, assign abilities, keep this packet current, and create one PR for the hero.
Browse current ability sources for each backlog ability and record mechanics, delays, radius, target type, and source URLs.
Choose detector type, evidence priority, confidence, gameloop windows, and docstring/evidence description.
Add versioned rules and detector support in data/replay modules without changing unrelated heroes.
Parse at least two real replays for this hero and record generated skillshot stats in the PR body.
Check plausibility, double counting, evidence strength, tests, and PR summary completeness.

implementedRules.reason: A versioned skillshot landing rule already exists for this ability.

rule.evidenceDescription: Counts the initial Chains cast as landed when the same user produces a Chains Link, Chains Pull, or Kel'Thuzad quest-progress event before the next Chains attempt and within the configured evidence window.

implementedRules.reason: A versioned skillshot landing rule already exists for this ability.

rule.evidenceDescription: Counts a Frost Nova cast as landed when one or more enemy Hero units produce Kel'Thuzad quest progress after impact, or when they overlap the calibrated replay-position radius at the configured impact delay. The mechanic center-root radius is recorded separately; the larger replay radius compensates for one-second unit-position samples. Repeated target-point updates inside the configured dedupe window are treated as one cast, using the first target point in that cast cluster.
